verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_3: No! You are going to know.
verse.verse_4: Then no! You are going to know.
verse.verse_5: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...
verse.verse_6: You will surely see the Hellfire.
verse.verse_7: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
verse.verse_8: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.
